title: liriope minor var. angustissima
intro: Liriope minor var. angustissima, also known as the Dwarf Lilyturf or Korean Lilyturf, is a type of flowering plant in the Asparagaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the production of inflammatory compounds and its antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Liriope minor var. angustissima include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into capsules, tablets, or teas, or used topically in creams and salves.
